text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, June 16. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: The lawn mower is having issues starting. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Automations are great when they work. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
